items: Discuss and consider a recommendation to the Town Council on an preliminary plat application for a 82.99 acre parcel generally located west of Naylor Road, across from

Potter Shop Road to Naylor Road excepting the Prairie House and the old landscape business. The property is currently vacant and zoned Agricultural. The request would comply with the Town’s Comprehensive Plan and allow for the site to be developed for commercial uses. This rezoning is the first step in the development process which will include a preliminary plat and final plat approvals prior to any new structures being

The property is currently vacant and zoned Agricultural. The request would comply with the Town’s Comprehensive Plan and allow for the site to be developed for a single residential building lot. This rezoning is the first step in the development process which will include platting the site prior to any new structures being constructed.

items: ITEM 2: ZC-26-0001 Public hearing, discussion, and make a recommendation to the City Council regarding an ordinance rezoning approximately 1.067-acre tract of land in the Proctor Addition, in the J. Proctor Survey, Abstract Number 683, in the City of Decatur, Wise County, Texas, from
Chairman LeMond opened the public hearing on ZC-26-0001 at 5:31 p.m.
Staff recommend approval of ZC-26-0001.

Concerned Citizen Kevin Haney 203 W. Walnut St., Decatur, Texas stated he is opposed to the zoning change request because he thinks the requested zoning change will negatively impact his two lots to the west and may eventually impact the value of the property on the corner because of the change to single family value or single family zoning. He said he thinks ultimately this property along this thoroughfare is more appropriate for light industrial zoning. Mr. Haney said there is a lack of light industrial zone property on major thoroughfares in the City of Decatur. He said he has been approached by a commercial/ retail user trying to purchase their property hinging on purchasing Mr. Brannon’s property.
LeMond asked for a motion for ZC-26-0001.
Vice-Chairman Woodruff made a motion to recommend approval of Zoning Change
ITEM 6: FP-25-0013 Consider and make a recommendation to the City Council regarding a Final Plat application for Block A, Lots 1-22, 1X, 2X; Block B, Lots 1-8, 1X; Block C, Lots 1-20, 1X;

Chairman LeMond opened the public hearing on ZC-26-0002 at 5:31 p.m.
Staff recommend approval of ZC-26-0002.

Commissioner Hicks made a motion to recommend approval of Zoning Change
Commissioner Mohamed made a motion to recommend approval of Comprehensive Plan
